prompt: Edit image 1: Apply the dark background color and the style of the large, centered headline text from image 2's main section to the hero section in image 1, changing its visual design.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. In the hero section (the top portion with the woman and main text), apply the dark blue-black background color and the prominent headline text style from the main content area of image 2. Specifically, transform the existing headlines 'iScripts MultiCart' and 'Multi-Vendor Shopping Cart' in image 1 to be large, bold, white, and horizontally centered, similar to 'The world's easiest design maker' in image 2.
objects: Dark blue-black background in the hero section
'iScripts MultiCart' text (large, bold, white, horizontally centered)
'Multi-Vendor Shopping Cart' text (large, bold, white, horizontally centered)
Woman in hero section (should not be present)
Top navigation links (PRODUCTS, SERVICES, SHOWCASE, SUPPORT, CONTACT US, BLOG, COMPANY, LOGIN)

Sub-text: "MultiCart is a unique multi-vendor shopping cart software that allows you to easily create your own e-commerce marketplace with multiple vendors in the backend, similar to Etsy or Amazon Marketplace."
Lower content section with icons and statistics (e.g., "15 Years in Business", "150+ Engineers Working", etc.)
